AR1.rationale: Daybook Log gets the interaction; followups.md gets a forward commitment (confirm recruiting + Q3 reconsideration); decisions.md correctly left untouched with an explicit note that an override would require supersession, not a silent edit.

AR2.rationale: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.rationale: Anchor in followups (`decisions.md#2026-04-15--restrict-initial-hiring-to-mid-level-engineers-only`, double hyphen) deviates from methodology.md's example shape (single hyphen, `decisions.md#2026-05-15-short-title`); it would still resolve under GitHub-style auto-anchors but is non-canonical relative to the documented convention.

AR4.rationale: Daybook is a new dated file; followups.md entry appended under Active; nothing rewrites prior history, so re-run/extension stays coherent.
